title: Payload — cypherx.auth.agent.registered
description: Contract 5 first-cycle payload. Emitted by the Auth service when a new agent is registered. Carried inside the Kafka event envelope `payload` field. Forward-compatible: tolerates unknown fields (additionalProperties:true).

agent_id.description: Identifier of the newly registered agent.

tenant_id.description: Isolation-boundary UUID the agent belongs to (Contract 13).

created_at.description: RFC 3339 UTC timestamp (millisecond precision) at which the agent was registered.

plan.description: Subscription/quota plan applied to the tenant at registration time (e.g. `free`, `pro`, `enterprise`).
